chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1440 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 08-12-2021 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents No.2 to 4. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for Respondents No.2 to 4-Sukkur Municipal Corporation has filed a statement, wherein it is stated that the differential pension amounting to Rs.3,81,660/- has been paid to the Petitioner through cheques No. 33436899 and 34217340 dated 07-09-2021 and 07-12-2021, respectively. In view of such position, the Petition has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
